meta_title: RetiClear — Restore Sharp, Clear Vision Naturally
meta_description: RetiClear targets the root cause of age-related vision decline. Clinically studied ingredients. 60-day money-back guarantee. Free shipping.
headline: Don't Let Age Steal Your
hero_subtext_1: If you're over 40 and noticing blurry vision, eye strain, or difficulty reading — you're not alone. And you don't have to accept it as "just getting older."
hero_subtext_2: RetiClear is a breakthrough natural formula designed to target the root cause of age-related vision decline — restoring crisp, comfortable eyesight from the inside out.
hero_guarantee_text: Risk-free — full refund if not satisfied. No questions asked.
benefits_headline: Why Most People Over 40 Struggle With Their Eyesight
benefits_paragraphs: After 40, the protective layer inside your eyes begins to thin. Oxidative stress, blue light exposure, and nutrient deficiencies accelerate the damage — causing blurry vision, eye strain, and difficulty focusing.
Reading menus, driving at night, seeing your phone clearly — things you once took for granted become daily struggles. And standard glasses only mask the symptoms.

RetiClear changes this. Our formula combines 8 clinically studied nutrients that target the root cause of vision decline — not just correcting your sight, but protecting and restoring it from the inside out.
urgency_text: Save $300 today — but stock is running low. Don't wait.
features_subheadline: Each ingredient chosen for maximum impact on eye health — backed by science, not hype.

features.title: Lutein (20mg)
features.description: The #1 nutrient for macular health. Filters harmful blue light and protects the retina from oxidative damage — keeping your central vision sharp.

features.title: Zeaxanthin (4mg)
features.description: Works alongside Lutein to form a protective shield over your macula. Reduces glare sensitivity and improves contrast vision.

features.title: Vitamin A (900mcg)
features.description: Essential for night vision and tear production. Prevents dry eyes and helps your retina convert light into clear images.

features.title: Bilberry Extract
features.description: Improves blood flow to the retina and strengthens capillaries. Used by pilots in WWII for sharper night vision.

features.title: Zinc (11mg)
features.description: Transports Vitamin A from liver to retina. Critical for maintaining the health of your eye's light-sensitive cells.

features.title: Omega-3 DHA
features.description: Makes up 60% of your retina's fatty acids. Reduces inflammation and supports the fluid layer that keeps eyes comfortable.

science_headline: How It Works: The 3-Step Vision Restoration
science_subheadline: RetiClear doesn't just mask symptoms — it targets the root causes of vision decline.

science_steps.text: Lutein and Zeaxanthin form a protective pigment layer over your macula — filtering blue light and blocking oxidative damage before it starts.
Bilberry Extract and Omega-3 improve microcirculation to the retina, delivering oxygen and nutrients to starving eye cells.
Vitamin A and Zinc work together to regenerate photoreceptor cells — the light-sensitive neurons that create sharp, detailed vision.

science_result: The result: You notice clearer vision within weeks. The improvement compounds over months.
reviews_headline: What Happens When You Take RetiClear
reviews_subheadline: These are verified reviews from people just like you — who refused to accept vision decline as inevitable.

reviews.body: I was told I'd need stronger glasses every year. After 3 months of RetiClear, my optometrist was shocked — my vision actually improved. I can read menus again without squinting. This stuff is real.
reviews.name: Patricia M., Phoenix, AZ

reviews.body: Night driving was terrifying. Headlights blurred into halos. After 6 weeks on RetiClear, the difference is night and day — literally. I feel safe behind the wheel again.
reviews.name: Robert J., Dallas, TX

reviews.body: I'm 62 and I was starting to lose hope. My doctor said macular degeneration was just part of aging. RetiClear gave me back my confidence. I can see my grandchildren's faces clearly. Worth every penny.
reviews.name: Linda S., Tampa, FL

faq_headline: Everything You Need to Know Before You Order

faq_items.question: Will this actually improve my vision?
faq_items.answer: RetiClear contains clinically studied nutrients (Lutein, Zeaxanthin, Bilberry, Omega-3 DHA) that have been shown in peer-reviewed studies to support macular health and improve visual acuity. Over 127,000 customers have reported noticeable improvements. While individual results vary, the science is clear — these nutrients protect and restore eye health. Give it 4-6 weeks of consistent use.

faq_items.question: Is it safe? Are there any side effects?
faq_items.answer: RetiClear is 100% natural, stimulant-free, and made in an FDA-registered, GMP-certified facility in the USA. The ingredients are well-studied vitamins and plant extracts with excellent safety profiles. No prescription needed. If you have an eye condition or take medications, consult your doctor first.

faq_items.question: How do I take it?
faq_items.answer: Just 2 capsules daily with a meal. Most people notice initial improvements in eye comfort and reduced strain within the first 2 weeks. For full vision restoration benefits, consistent use for 3-6 months is recommended.

faq_items.question: What if it doesn't work for me?
faq_items.answer: We have a 60-day unconditional money-back guarantee. If you don't notice a meaningful improvement in your vision within 60 days, contact us for a full refund — no questions asked. You can even keep the bottles.

faq_items.question: Is this a subscription?
faq_items.answer: No. One-time purchase only. No hidden charges, no auto-shipments, no surprises. Many customers reorder because they love the results — but that's entirely your choice.

faq_items.question: Why do most customers choose the 6-bottle kit?
faq_items.answer: Two reasons: First, vision restoration is not overnight — it takes consistent daily nutrition over 3-6 months for the ingredients to fully rebuild and protect your eye tissue. Second, the 6-bottle kit offers the biggest discount (save $300) and includes free shipping.

modals.title: Privacy Policy
modals.intro: Last updated: 2026. RetiClear and its authorized distributors are committed to protecting your personal information.

sections.heading: Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect information you provide directly (name, email, shipping address, payment information) when you place an order. We also collect usage data automatically through cookies and analytics tools.

sections.heading: How We Use Your Information
sections.content: Your information is used exclusively to process your order, provide customer support, send order updates, and (with your consent) inform you of promotions. We do not sell or rent your personal data.

sections.heading: Data Security
sections.content: All payment transactions are encrypted using SSL technology. We maintain physical, electronic, and procedural safeguards to protect your information.

modals.title: Terms of Service
modals.intro: By purchasing from this website, you agree to the following terms and conditions.

sections.heading: Independent Distributor
sections.content: This website is operated by an independent authorized distributor. Purchases are fulfilled through the official fulfillment network.

sections.heading: Product Use
sections.content: RetiClear is a dietary supplement designed for adults. Do not exceed the recommended dosage. Consult with a healthcare professional before use if you have any medical conditions.

sections.heading: Limitation of Liability
sections.content: Our liability is limited to the purchase price of the product. Individual results may vary and are not guaranteed.

modals.title: Returns & Refunds
